intro: Columnea schlimii, also known as Colombian Columnea, is a tropical plant species belonging to the Gesneriaceae family, native to the Andean region of Colombia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, and its extracts have been found to possess various health benefits, including antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial activities. The bioactive constituents of Columnea schlimii include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and alkaloids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties.
